data.name: Cursed Affection
data.detailed_description:
A quiet night in Oakridge Valley turns into a nightmare when a mysterious phone call leads a U.S. Marshal to an abandoned church. Inside lies a wounded girl and the remnants of a ritual that was never meant to be seen.

As the last hope for a town slipping into madness, you must uncover the truth behind Allison, the girl with no memory, and the curse that’s spreading through Oakridge Valley. Phones go silent, the fog thickens, and an invisible barrier traps everyone inside — alive or otherwise.

Cursed Affection blends supernatural horror, emotional storytelling, and intimate human connections in a world where affection itself may be your downfall.
Face haunting creatures with white eyes, uncover the origin of the dome, and decide who you can trust — or love — as the line between salvation and damnation blurs.

Features

  • Deep, branching narrative with meaningful player choices

  • Optional romance paths that intertwine with the story’s fate

  • Supernatural horror & psychological tension

  • Immersive sound design, dynamic lighting, and music

  • Cinematic and adult animations

  • Scene and ending gallery unlockables

When the world ends, will love save you — or destroy you?

data.short_description: A quiet night in Oakridge Valley spirals into chaos after you rescue a girl from a sinister ritual. As the last law enforcement officer in town, you’ll face paranormal horrors, twisted secrets, and the darkness that hungers to consume everything you swore to protect.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 15 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 15 GB 可用空間
